name: Orbital Lance
description: FSA Command authorises orbital lance strike. Devastating beam weapon across the entire battlefield. Requires Floor 12+ clearance.

name: Drop Pod Strike
description: Drop an empty pod on enemy position. Area impact damage. Requires Floor 8+ clearance.

name: Siege Breaker
description: CC superheavy siege cannon. Ignores all defensive bonuses. Requires Floor 8+ clearance.

name: Iron Wall Protocol
description: Activate full defensive matrix. Immune to all damage for one turn but cannot move or attack. Requires Floor 8+ clearance.

name: Ghost Protocol
description: Full spectrum stealth. Cannot be detected or targeted for two turns. Requires Floor 12+ clearance.

name: Warlord Command
description: Issue orders to scavenger network. Draw 4 cards and gain 15 credits. Requires Floor 12+ clearance.

name: Omega Protocol
description: Maximum authorised force orbital kinetic strike. Single target annihilation. Requires Floor 18+ clearance.

name: Total War Doctrine
description: Escalate to unrestricted warfare. All your directives deal +3 damage for 3 turns but cost +1 OL. Requires Floor 15+ clearance.

name: Uprising
description: Spark a local uprising. All enemies take 3 damage and your evasion increases by 20. Requires Floor 15+ clearance.

name: Nanite Repair Swarm
description: Experimental nanobot repair system. Restore 15 HP over three turns. Requires Floor 15+ clearance.
